location: Dropped by the Draconic Tree Sentinel, an optional mounted boss guarding the main road into Leyndell just before the Capital Rampart gate.
tactics: This fight is skippable — you can instead reach Leyndell through Deeproot Depths via Fia's questline if you want to avoid it
Don't confuse this with the standard Tree Sentinel duo fought earlier at Stormveil Castle; this version is faster, hits harder, and rides alone
Target the horse's legs to stagger the mount, and stay in close to disrupt its long lightning-charged lance combos
A Stake of Marika is nearby for a second attempt if your first run fails
lore: Carved from the talon of a colossal, ancient dragon, this weapon was given to the grotesque Tree Sentinels who still stand guard for the Erdtree; wreathed in crackling lightning, it is especially lethal against dragons and their diminished descendants.

builds.name: Anti-dragon quality build
builds.why: Innate lightning damage plus a sizable bonus against dragon-type foes makes it a strong pick for Caelid's dragons, Bokoh, and other draconic fights.

builds.name: No-infusion lightning stick
builds.why: It cannot be infused or buffed, but its baked-in 78 lightning attack power is competitive on its own for a low-maintenance quality build.
